message:
feat(html_export): highlight matching messages during search

Enhance the search feature to visually highlight entire message
containers that contain matches:

- Clear previous search-hit classes on each new search
- Track which .message elements contain match nodes using a Set
- Apply .search-hit class to parent message containers, producing
  a visible border/glow effect defined in styles.rs
- This makes it easier to scan long sessions and spot which
  conversation turns contain the search term

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
